Sideways Sales Letter
Now we get to the absolute core strategy inside Product Launch Formula.
!
It's what I call the Sideways Sales Letter.
!
If you’re brand new to Product Launch Formula you might be wondering, “What does
that mean? That sounds pretty weird.”
!
There are a lot of different paths through these strategies and tactics, but the one
common theme, the one common path for the most successful PLF owners, for the
people who really take this and put it to use, is the Sideways Sales Letter. That’s the
core strategy.
!
It’s the opposite of the old style sales letter.
!
Most of us have been on an old school sales letter. None of us ever go to a sales letter
intentionally, we end up on a sales letter. The web page will load, and then when it
loads, there's this scroll bar off to the side.
!
The scroll bar is really big when the page first starts loading, or if you have a slow
internet connection like I do. But then that sales letter starts loading up... and it loads
10 pages or 20 pages, maybe 30 or 40 pages... and that little scroll bar gets really small
as all those pages load, and you end up with this huge 30 page sales letter. They're
really long.
!
The thing is, people don’t tend to read those long sales letters. What they do is they
grab that scroll bar and they scroll down to the bottom to check what the price is and
then they decide whether they want to scroll back up and maybe read your headline.
Maybe they’ll read a few bullet points, and they’ll come back down to the offer. That’s
what generally happens in the long form sales letter, the old school sales letter.
!
There is a time and a place for a long form sales letter. I’m not saying it’s evil, or you
can’t do it, or that it absolutely doesn’t work. There is a time and a place for it. This is
sort of the old school marketing.
!
The Sideways Sales Letter is where we take this long vertical sales letter - maybe it’s 10
pages... 20 pages... or 30 pages - and we turn it sideways and we make it a 10 day
sequence. That’s the core of Product Launch Formula.
!
It's different from one sales message, when you send an email and you send people to
your sales page, your sales video or your sales letter, and you hope that they buy.
That’s what I call hope marketing. This is the opposite of hope marketing.
!
Hope is a fantastic word. If you’re shipwrecked and you’re just drifting out on the sea
and you’re hoping someone comes to rescue you. In that kind of situation, hope can
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 2
PLF_Module1v1.0

-- 2 of 6 --

literally keep you alive. But in business, you don’t want to depend on hope. You want to
engineer your success.
!
When you just email and send someone to a one off sales letter or a sales video, and
you’re hoping they buy, that doesn’t work. This is the Sideways Sales Letter, the new
style that converts now.
!
This is my depiction of a sideways letter. These three boxes are your prelaunch,
what we call our PLC – prelaunch content. This is a classic internal kind of launch, but
conceptually this will work for all your launches. What you’re doing is you’re putting out
content in each one of those.
!
This is your first piece of PLC, your second piece of PLC, and your third piece of PLC.
!
Typically in your prelaunch content you’re doing a lot of the same things that you would
do in a sales letter, but you’re spreading it out over time.
!
What you’re doing is you’re building a relationship, you’re delivering real value, you’re
delivering really great content as you move through this.
!
The Sideways Sales Letter allows you to do everything you do down in here, but you
get people to pay attention and you’re building rapport as you go along. It gives you a
chance to hit the mental triggers. We’ll be getting to the triggers a little later in this
module. These mental triggers are the things that cause people to act. They’re things
like authority and reciprocity, and social proof, and scarcity, and community.
!
In these prelaunch videos, they give you the opportunity to deploy those mental
triggers and to build a relationship.
!
One of the things they really do is they really help you with the good old B.S. detector.
Basically, think about when you walk onto a used car lot and the salesman is coming
out to walk towards you. Generally, your B.S. detector is going off the chart, you don’t
necessarily believe him and you’re up in the red zone. You know he’s coming to sell
you, you don’t have a lot of faith that you can trust him, so you’re just not going to
believe anything he says. Everything he says, you’re going to take it with a grain of salt.
When someone comes to your old style sales letter, what happens is... as soon as they
see this page load, as soon as they see this headline and see this huge page load...
their B.S. detector goes into the red zone and they’re not going to believe what you
have to say. They’re going to be very skeptical.
!
What happens when you come out with prelaunch content, and you deliver some really
great value, and then three days later you release another video that teaches, trains,
and gives them real value?
!
Then what you do is here we’ve got the green zone. The green zone is like when your
mom is telling you, “Wow, I just ate at a really great restaurant. You should check it
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 3
PLF_Module1v1.0

-- 3 of 6 --

out.” Your mom is telling you that, so you’re probably going to believe her. You don’t
think she has an ulterior motive, you really trust her.
!
Let’s say there’s sort of three zones here. It’s green, black, and red. Here is mom telling
you about a restaurant or whatever, something innocuous. You completely believe over
here. Over here you don’t believe the salesman so much.
!
They come to your long form sales letter, they’re in the red zone immediately. But over
here... what happens is when you start delivering great content here, and giving them
real value in their lives, and you start hitting these mental triggers... then you go from
being in the red zone and you move over. You might not go over into the green zero,
like they’d believe a mom, but they believe you and they trust you a lot more and they
start to like you.
!
The big thing about this sideways sales letter is it basically moves people from
skepticism to trust before you ever get to that sale. It's a sequence of actions.
!
As we go through Product Launch Formula, we’re going to walk through all kinds of
sequences, the timing of this, what to do in each one of these, what to say in each one
of these pieces of prelaunch content.
!
In an Internal Launch, this might be your day one. This is your timeline down here.
Day four. Day seven. And then here you open cart, and this is your sales video or your
sales letter. We might release that on day 10. Again, I’m going to go through all of this
in detail, walk you through all of this as we go through Product Launch Formula.
Different types of launches have different timing, that might just be a typical Internal
Launch.
!
Your first piece of prelaunch content is great for authority. Generally, if you’re giving
out great prelaunch content, you’re teaching and that automatically establishes you as
an authority. It’s just an automatic thing. When you’re publishing, whether it’s
publishing online or publishing in any form, as a publisher people automatically look at
you as an authority. When you can just sit there and give out good content for free, you
are seen as an authority.
!
Another thing, you’ll start to build up reciprocity here. That is if you give someone
something, they will feel some kind of debt to give you something back. Just by giving
them great free content, you’re starting to build this reciprocity. That will come in handy
down the road.
!
I’m going to go through all these triggers and exactly how they work, how you use
them, and what they mean later in this module and as we go through the course. I’m
just being very conceptual here with the Sideways Sales Letter.
!
In that first video, you’ll typically also get some social proof. Social proof is this idea if
we see other people doing something, then we think it might be a good thing. Typically
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 4
PLF_Module1v1.0

-- 4 of 6 --

you’ll get comments or you’ll ask for comments on that video or that piece of prelaunch
content. It will be on a blog and people can see those comments. That’s automatic
social proof.
!
This first piece we call the opportunity.
!
That’s where you’re teaching people that there’s an opportunity for change.
!
Real big picture, one of the greatest things I think you can do for someone is show
them that they have an opportunity to change.
!
Show them they can have an opportunity to lower their golf score. Or they have an
opportunity to make more money as a massage therapist. Or they have an opportunity
to have a better relationship or to attract the love of their life. Or the opportunity to
play guitar.
!
You’re showing them that they can change their life. That they can get better at
something, get more of something, reduce their pain.
!
This first piece is generally about the opportunity to get these great results, to get
this transformation.
!
The second one is what we call the transformation video.
!
This is where you start to make it real. Often you’ll have a case study or you’ll do a lot
more heavy duty teaching in the second video. That way you’re basically getting more
authority, reciprocity, and social proof. There’s this idea of likability where people start
to like you more.
!
Often we have a lot of community that starts to build up. The community can actually
build up in the comments. Just people helping each other or answering each other,
building on each other’s comments. You can really start to build some community in
that second piece.
!
This third one is the ownership experience.
!
In that third one, we’re really starting to give them the feel of what it will be like to own
your product. In this one, we’re hitting authority and reciprocity again, but we start to
build in social proof really big. And scarcity really comes into play in this one.
!
What you do is over these seven days, or five days, or 10 days, you really start to build
real trust.
!
They trust you, they like you, and generally they want to buy from you.
!
!
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 5
PLF_Module1v1.0

-- 5 of 6 --

!
By the time you get to your sales letter or your sales video, you still do the same kind of
things you do in this long form sales letter, but by the time you get here they are pre-
sold.
!
That is really what the Sideways Sales Letter is all about is, by the time you ask them to
buy from you, they are pre-sold... they’re ready to buy... they can’t wait to get out their
credit card and give you their money.
!
So we have lots of different ways to deploy the Sideways Sales Letter. It’s not always
videos. It can be PDFs, it could be software, it could be blog posts, it can all be done
via email. I’ve done plenty of launches that were all done via email. These days, for the
bigger launches, we’re often doing video.
!
There are many different ways to deploy this, many different ways to deliver
it, many different time frames. There’s different styles of launches, but they
all basically revolve around delivering some great prelaunch content before
you ask for the sale. This one concept – the Sideways Sales Letter – has
completely changed marketing. That is the one concept that has driven the
half billion dollars in sales that we’ve had with PLF Owners.
!
That is the Sideways Sales Letter. Nail this... get this down... and you win, and you’re
going to continue to win.
